title: Bitfarms Ltd Investor Relations Summary via Quartr
text: Quartr provides comprehensive Bitfarms investor relations summary including earnings outlook, financial performance trends, and strategic initiatives. The platform aggregates quarterly financial data, management guidance, and analyst consensus estimates. Bitfarms earnings summary shows revenue progression from $142 million in 2022 to $146 million in 2023 to $192.88 million in 2024, demonstrating revenue growth despite lower Bitcoin production volumes. Net loss trend improved from -$239 million in 2022 to -$104 million in 2023 to -$54.06 million in 2024. The company's transformation strategy toward HPC/AI infrastructure is reflected in capital allocation patterns and management commentary. Adjusted EBITDA metrics provide cash generation insight independent of non-cash charges. Bitcoin production metrics tracked company's mining operations with 5,167 BTC in 2022, 4,928 BTC in 2023, and 2,914 BTC in 2024. Quartr's investor relations platform enables comparison of Bitfarms' financial metrics against industry peers and historical trends.
